meaning: n.疲乏,疲劳,累活,[军]杂役vt.使疲劳,使心智衰弱vi.疲劳
examples: Driver fatigue was to blame for the accident.
She was plagued by weakness, fatigue, and dizziness.
The wing of the plane showed signs of metal fatigue.
The main issue I think gaming journalism is suffering from right now is fatigue.
Low thinks that these companies suffer from "brand fatigue, " compared with some newer brands.
